audit_status.source_base: Greek 2 Timothy text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for difficult seasons, exploitative teachers, women-household passage, Jannes/Jambres, persecution, sacred writings, Scripture usefulness.

verses.restored: But know this, that in last days difficult seasons will stand present.
For humans will be lovers of self, lovers of silver/money, boastful, arrogant, blasphemous, disobedient to parents, ungrateful, unholy,
without natural affection, irreconcilable, slanderous, without self-control, untamed, not loving the beautiful/good,
betrayers, reckless, puffed up, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of the Divine,
having form of reverence/godliness but denying its power; turn away from these.
For from these are those entering into households and taking captive little-women weighed down with sins/misalignments, led by various desires,
always learning and never able to come into knowledge of truth.
And just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, so also these oppose the truth, humans corrupted in mind, disapproved concerning the trust.
But they will not advance very far, for their folly will be manifest to all, as also that of those became.
But you followed my teaching, conduct, purpose, trust, patience, love, endurance,
pursuits/persecutions, sufferings, such as happened to me in Antioch, Iconium, Lystra; what pursuits/persecutions I endured, and out of all the Lord rescued me.
And indeed all those willing to live reverently in Messiah Jesus will be pursued/persecuted.
But harmful humans and impostors will advance toward the worse, deceiving and being deceived.
But you remain in the things you learned and were persuaded of, knowing from whom you learned,
and that from infancy you have known sacred writings, which are able to make you wise into salvation/healing through trust in Messiah Jesus.
Every Scripture is God-breathed/Divine-breathed and useful for teaching, for reproof, for correction, for training in righteousness/justice,
so that the human of the Divine may be complete, equipped for every beautiful/good work.

safety_note: 2 Timothy 3:6-7 must not be used to stereotype women as gullible. The passage targets predatory teachers exploiting particular vulnerable households. The broader corpus honors women as transmitters of trust, coworkers, deacons/servants, prophets, patrons, and house-assembly leaders.
translation_notes: The Scripture passage is framed as equipping for beautiful/good work, not prooftext domination.
Theopneustos is rendered God-breathed/Divine-breathed to preserve Spirit/breath resonance.
